Part of Mezzofy Exchange Protocol | View Ecosystem

NFC DISTRIBUTION NETWORK

POWER YOUR SPACES WITH THE NFC NETWORK

Become a distribution node connecting merchant coupons directly to your captive audience through seamless tap-activated NFC technology — and earn recurring revenue.

Become a Channel Partner View Partner Types

Why Become an NFC Channel Partner?

Transform your physical spaces into high-value distribution nodes in the Mezzofy Exchange network

Zero Tech Burden

Mezzofy handles all technology, content updates, and merchant inventory management

Captive Audience Value

Reach office workers, shoppers, or tenants with high-intent merchant offers

Network Effect

Every new merchant makes your distribution node more valuable to your audience

Revenue Opportunity

Performance-based earnings aligned with successful merchant-consumer connections

Distribution Opportunities for Every Space

NFC channel partnerships designed for malls, corporate environments, and property portfolios

Mall Operators

Tags at entrances, directories, food courts, and tenant spaces drive foot traffic and enhance shopper experience

Value Delivered:

  • Drive foot traffic with merchant offers
  • Tenant value-add service
  • Redemption analytics & insights

Corporate HR & Benefits

Tags in office lobbies, pantries, and lift areas provide employee perks without fulfillment burden

Value Delivered:

  • Zero-cost employee benefits program
  • High-intent professional audience
  • Engagement tracking for HR metrics

Property Developers

Scalable deployment across property portfolios creates tenant amenity value and differentiation

Value Delivered:

  • Multi-location rollout potential
  • Tenant attraction & retention tool
  • Property differentiation amenity

How Channel Partners Activate Distribution Nodes

Five simple steps from partner onboarding to live consumer engagement

1

Partner Onboards

Simple setup process with Mezzofy configuring NFC tags for your spaces

2

Tags Deployed

Strategic placement in high-traffic areas (lobbies, entrances, pantries)

3

Merchants Flow Through

Any merchant from the Mezzofy exchange can appear on your tags

4

Consumers Engage

Users tap to collect offers directly to their mobile wallets

5

Network Grows

More redemptions generate data that attracts more merchants

The Distribution Network Flywheel

Every new channel partner makes the entire network more valuable for merchants and consumers

More Channel Nodes

More malls, offices, and properties join the distribution network

More Distribution for Merchants

Wider reach attracts more quality merchants to the exchange

More Consumer Engagement

Better merchant offers drive higher tap and redemption rates

Better Data & Targeting

More redemptions generate intelligence that improves targeting

Higher Redemption Rates

Smarter targeting attracts even more merchants (loop repeats)

Launch Pilot Opportunities Available

Partner with Mezzofy on strategic pilot deployments with proven enterprise partners

Tier-1 Global Bank (HR Pilot)

Internal employee benefits NFC deployment across multiple office locations. Pilot with a global bank serving as both channel partner and demand buyer.

  • Captive professional audience
  • Enterprise-grade case study
  • Multi-market expansion potential

Mid-Size Mall Operators

Faster decision cycles, more experimental mindset, strong case study potential for scaling to larger REIT partners.

  • Rapid deployment & iteration
  • Tenant & shopper engagement data
  • Pathway to REIT partnerships

Flexible Partnership Terms

Aligned incentives with performance-based models, not upfront subscriptions

Performance-Based

Transaction fees on successful redemptions through your distribution nodes

  • Pay only for actual redemptions
  • No upfront costs
  • Volume discounts available
POPULAR

Revenue Share

Earn from merchant payments on redemptions flowing through your network

  • Passive revenue stream
  • Aligned incentives
  • Monthly settlement

Custom Deployment

Tailored terms for large property portfolios and multi-location partners

  • Bespoke contract terms
  • Dedicated account manager
  • White-label options

No monthly subscriptions. No upfront inventory costs. Your revenue grows as the network grows.

Frequently Asked Questions

What are my technology obligations as a channel partner?

Zero. Mezzofy handles all technology infrastructure, merchant inventory management, tag configuration, and content updates. You simply deploy the physical tags in your spaces.

How do I control which merchant offers appear on my tags?

Channel partners can set geographic, category, and value tier filters. Mezzofy's routing engine automatically matches the most relevant merchant inventory to your audience demographics and location.

What if a merchant leaves the network?

Your tags remain fully operational. The Mezzofy exchange automatically routes new merchant inventory to replace any merchants that leave. The distribution node stays alive and valuable to your audience.

How quickly can I launch a pilot deployment?

Onboarding typically takes 1-2 weeks from initial discussion to live deployment. For strategic partners (enterprise HR, mid-size malls), we fast-track to 5-7 business days with dedicated implementation support.
